description_long: This is a high-top sneaker in a pale green color, featuring a classic Converse All Star design. The shoe has a canvas upper with visible metal eyelets for lacing and white cotton laces threaded in a standard criss-cross pattern. The iconic circular Converse All Star logo patch is present on the inner ankle area, rendered in black and white. The toe cap is made of white rubber, and the midsole is white with a black stripe running along its length, showing some signs of wear and dirt. The outsole is not fully visible, but the shoe appears to have a flat, vulcanized rubber sole typical of Converse sneakers. The overall condition suggests it has been worn but remains structurally intact.
description: A pale green high-top Converse sneaker with white laces, a rubber toe cap, and a visible All Star logo patch. The shoe shows some signs of wear but is structurally sound.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Converse All Star logo patch, metal eyelets, and the full length of the white rubber sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white rubber toe cap, lacing, and the tongue of the shoe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view without the logo patch, displaying the smooth green canvas and the white laces.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the heel, back seam, and the inside of the shoe's collar.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner ankle, black text and star on white background
